blocks.text: I  WILL TROUBLE  THE  TWO OF  YOU  TO  GO  IN OUR  STEAD .
blocks.translation: I'LL ENTRUST THIS TO THE TWO OF YOU.
Park Seongwoo
Staff: Han Saem, Kang Ji In

blocks.text: 그림 · 박성우 각색 .  제행 무상 원작 . 언 라이팅  최현우
blocks.translation: Art: Park Seongwoo Adaptation: Jeh Haeng Musang Original Work: Unlighting, Choi Hyunwoo
PODOOO NEMEZIUM Red Ice Studio

blocks.text: ※ 본  저작물 은  REDICE  STUDIO 가  저작권자 와 의  계약 에  따라  발행 한  것으로 저작권법 의  보호 를  받는  저작물 입니다 .  본서 의  내용 을  무단  전재  및  무단  복제 하는  것을  금합니다 .
blocks.translation: ※ This work is published under contract with REDICE STUDIO and is protected by copyright law. Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is strictly prohibited.
Gyaaah!!

blocks.text: HUH ?  WHO THE  HELL  IS THAT ?
blocks.translation: Huh? Who the hell is that?
You bastards!!

blocks.text: DO  YOU  HAVE  NO FEAR  OF  HEAVEN ?!
blocks.translation: Don’t you fear Heaven?!
Heaven? What Heaven?

blocks.text: YOU  DARE  SPEAK OF  HEAVEN'S  WILL  BEFORE THE  IRON - BLOODED WAR  GOD ?!
blocks.translation: You dare speak of Heaven’s will before the iron-blooded War God?!

blocks.text: HEAVEN'S  WILL  HAS NO  OBSTACLES !  IT  FLOWS THIS  WAY  AND  THAT  AS IT  PLEASES !
blocks.translation: Heaven’s will faces no obstacles! It flows freely, as it pleases!

blocks.text: AND  HERE  I  AM AGAIN ...  WANG  GON , THE  IDIOT  WHO  THINKS SPOUTING  LOFTY NONSENSE SOLVES EVERYTHING .
blocks.translation: And here I go again... Wang Gon, the fool who thinks lofty words will fix everything.

blocks.text: OUR  JEONGGAJANG HAS  NO  GRUDGE  AGAINST YOU ,  IRON - BLOODED  WAR GOD !  WHAT  ARE  YOU DOING  HERE !!!
blocks.translation: Our Jeonggajang holds no grudge against you, Iron-Blooded War God! What are you doing here?!

blocks.text: AND  EVEN  IF  THERE WAS  A  GRUDGE  TO  SETTLE , SINCE  WHEN  WERE  MURDER  AND SLAUGHTER  THE  LAWS  OF  THE WATERWAY  STRONGHOLDS  AND THE  HERO  ALLIANCE !!!
blocks.translation: Even if there was a grudge, since when is murder and slaughter the law of Waterway Strongholds and the Hero Alliance?!

blocks.text: LAW ?  WHAT  LAW ?! THE  PATH  I  WALK  IS  THE  WAY , AND  THE  WORDS  I  SPEAK ARE  THE  LAW !!!
blocks.translation: Law? What law?! The path I walk is the way, and my words are the law!

blocks.text: WHEN  YOU SEE  AN  OPENING , GET  YOUR  MOTHER AND  ESCAPE .
blocks.translation: When you see an opening, get your mother and run.
Father!

blocks.text: IT  HAS  TO  BE YOU .  YOU'RE  THE  ONLY ONE  WHO  CAN  LOOK AFTER  YOUR  MOTHER AND  YOUR  LITTLE SISTER ...
blocks.translation: It has to be you. You’re the only one who can protect your mother and little sister...
WE Mulis

blocks.text: AND  THE  ONLY ONE  I  CAN  ENTRUST JEONGGAJANG'S FUTURE  TO .
blocks.translation: I'm the only one I can trust with Jeonggajang's future.
Father...

blocks.text: FATHER'S  HAND  IS TREMBLING  EVER SO  SLIGHTLY .
blocks.translation: Father's hand is trembling just a little.

blocks.text: CAN  THOSE BASTARDS  NOT EVEN  SEE  THAT MUCH ?
blocks.translation: Can't those bastards even see that?
Don't worry about me.
I can fight, too.

blocks.text: HE'S  RIGHT . DON'T  WORRY ABOUT  US .
blocks.translation: He's right. Don't worry about us.

blocks.text: TODAY , WE GLADLY SHARE JEONGGAJANG'S FATE .
blocks.translation: Today, we gladly share Jeonggajang's fate.
Uh... dear...
Hmph. Is that so?

blocks.text: TO  DIE TOGETHER ... THEN  I  SHOULD GRANT  IT .
blocks.translation: To die together... then I shall grant it.
Don't you agree?

blocks.text: YOU HEARD  THEM ,  THIRD . GO  GRANT  THEIR WISH .
blocks.translation: You heard them, Third. Go grant their wish.
Yes, Brother.
Gasp...!!
Father!
My dear!!
... I'm fine.

blocks.text: HMPH .  I'LL TAKE  YOUR  HEAD NEXT  TIME .
blocks.translation: Hmph. Your head’s mine next time.
And after that...

blocks.text: I'LL  DRINK THE  BLOOD  OF YOUR  WIFE  AND CHILDREN .
blocks.translation: I’ll drink your wife and children’s blood.
I won’t let that happen.

blocks.text: EVEN  IF  IT  COSTS ME  MY  LIFE ...  I  WILL KILL  YOU !!
blocks.translation: Even if it costs me my life... I will kill you!!
Come then...
Try it!!!

blocks.text: 그림 · 박성우  각색 ·  제행 무상  원작  ·  언 라이팅  최현우
blocks.translation:
Art by Park Sung-woo
Adaptation by Jehaeng Musang
Original by Un Lighting, Choi Hyun-woo
Chapter 202
Kh... Kh!
Mutual destruction?
This isn't mutual destr-uction.
Who's there?! Show yourself!

blocks.text: WHAT'S WRONG ,  BROTHER ? WHO  WOULD  BE OUT  HERE  IN  THE MIDDLE  OF ...
blocks.translation: What's wrong, brother? Who would be out here, in the middle of...
the
Amitabha.
Huh? A monk?

blocks.text: AND  WHO  ARE  YOU  TO DARE  INTERFERE  WITH  THE  HERO ALLIANCE'S  BUSINESS ?!
blocks.translation: And who are you to meddle in the Hero Alliance’s affairs?!

blocks.text: I  AM A  MONK  WHO  HAS THE  SECULAR STEPPED  INTO WORLD .
blocks.translation: I’m a monk who has stepped beyond the secular world.

blocks.text: YOU  DARE PLAY  WORD  GAMES WITH  ME ... !!
blocks.translation: You dare play word games with me...!!
Are you from Shaolin?
I am.
Your Dharma name?
Hyecheon.

blocks.text: HYECHEON ... NEVER  HEARD  OF THAT  ONE .
blocks.translation: Hyecheon...? Never heard of it.
Tsk tsk.

blocks.text: WELL ,  WE'VE  BEEN IN  SECLUSION A  VERY LONG  TIME ,  SO  THAT'S NOT  SURPRISING .
blocks.translation:
Well, we've been isolated for a long time,
so it's not surprising.

blocks.text: YOU'LL FIND  OUT  SOON ENOUGH  WHAT SHAOLIN'S  ARTS LOOK  LIKE ...
blocks.translation: You'll soon see what Shaolin's arts are really like...

blocks.text: WHEN  YOU SEE  THERE'S ALWAYS  A  SKY ABOVE  THE SKY .
blocks.translation: Once you realize there's always a sky beyond the sky.

blocks.text: OH ?  NOW THAT'S  QUITE  THE BOLD STATE- MENT .
blocks.translation: Oh? That’s quite a bold claim.

blocks.text: SINCE WHEN  DID  SENIOR BROTHER  TAEWON START  LECTURING YOU  ON  THINGS LIKE  THAT ?
blocks.translation: Since when did Senior Brother Taewon start preaching to you about this?
T-That bastard...!!

blocks.text: PLUM  BLOSSOM SWORD  MAIDEN !! WHAT  ARE  YOU DOING  HERE ?!
blocks.translation: Plum Blossom Sword Maiden!! What are you doing here?!
Yo. Been well?

blocks.text: YOU  RAN  SO HARD  WITH  YOUR  TAIL BETWEEN  YOUR  LEGS , I'M  IMPRESSED  YOU'RE STILL  ALIVE .
blocks.translation: You ran like crazy with your tail between your legs. I'm surprised you're still alive.

blocks.text: LEAST YOUR  EYES  ARE AT STILL WORKING , I  SEE ?
blocks.translation: At least your eyes are still working, I see?

blocks.text: SHOULD'VE HIT  HIM  A  BIT  HARDER BACK  THEN ...  TCH .
blocks.translation: Should've hit him harder back then... Tch.

blocks.text: TO  THINK I'D MEET  YOU HERE .  WHAT DELIGHTFUL FATE .
blocks.translation: To think I'd meet you here. What a delightful twist of fate.

blocks.text: BEING  HUNTED BY  THE  MURIM  ALLIANCE BACK  THEN ,  I  REGRET- TED  NOT  GIVING  YOU A  PROPER  BEATING . IT'S  HAUNTED  ME EVER SINCE .
blocks.translation: Back then, hunted by the Murim Alliance, I regret not beating you properly. It’s haunted me ever since.

blocks.text: TODAY  I'LL TAKE  YOUR  ARM AND  SETTLE  THAT OLD SCORE .
blocks.translation: Today, I’ll take your arm and settle that old score.

blocks.text: AH ,  THAT  MIGHT BE  A  BIT  OF  A PROBLEM .
blocks.translation: Ah, that might be a bit of a problem.
LE
What do you mean?

blocks.text: BECAUSE THE  ONE  TEACHING MY  DISCIPLES  A LESSON  TODAY ...
blocks.translation: Because the one teaching my disciples a lesson today...
...is actually this man.
Huh?!
Do

blocks.text: WH ...  WHAT  IS THAT  TERRIFYING PRESENCE ... ?
blocks.translation: Wh... what is that terrifying presence...?
Blood...
MOVE!!!
HAAAH!!!
Th-That can't be...
That fist... could it be...?
CH
Mount Emei, Sichuan Province.

blocks.text: TRUE  TO  ITS  NAME ,  WHICH  MEANS " A  GRACEFUL  WOMAN'S  BROWS , "  IT  WAS  A FAMED  MOUNTAIN  OF  STUNNING  SCENERY AND  CRYSTAL - CLEAR  WATERS .
blocks.translation: True to its name, meaning "A Graceful Woman's Brows," it was famed for stunning scenery and crystal-clear waters.

blocks.text: BUT  IN  THE  MARTIAL WORLD ,  MOUNT  EMEI'S  NAME HELD  AN  ENTIRELY  DIFFERENT MEANING .
blocks.translation: But in the martial world, Mount Emei's name carried a very different significance.

blocks.text: ALL  BECAUSE  OF THE  ** EMEI  SECT ** ,  WHICH MADE  ITS  HOME  THERE .
blocks.translation: All because of the ** Emei Sect **, which made it their home.
Such words are utterly unacceptable!!!

blocks.text: NO  MATTER  HOW ARROGANT  THE  TAEPYEONG ALLIANCE  MAY  BE ,  HOW COULD  THEY  DO  SOME- THING  LIKE  THIS ?!
blocks.translation: No matter how arrogant the Taepyeong Alliance is, how could they stoop to this?!

blocks.text: ABBESS  JISIM ,  ONE OF  THE  TWELVE  SENIOR NUNS  OF  EMEI
blocks.translation: Abbess Jisim, one of the twelve senior nuns of Emei

blocks.text: INSTEAD OF INVITING US TO SEND A REPRESENTATIVE AS AN HONORED GUEST , THEY DIDN'T EVEN BOTHER TO INFORM US ABOUT THEIR GREAT TOURNAMENT-
blocks.translation: Instead of inviting us to send a representative as an honored guest, they didn't even bother to tell us about their grand tournament—

blocks.text: AND  NOW  THEY DARE  TELL  US  TO  " EXERCISE RESTRAINT " ?!
blocks.translation: And now they have the nerve to tell us to "exercise restraint"?!

blocks.text: THE  TANG  CLAN'S ATTITUDE  ISN'T  " SOME- WHAT CONTROVERSIAL , " IT'S  OUTRIGHT  HIGH- HANDED .
blocks.translation: The Tang Clan's attitude isn't just "somewhat controversial," it's downright arrogant.

blocks.text: TELLING  US TO  RESTRAIN  OUR- SELVES  IS  NOTHING BUT  PROVOCATION- NOTHING MORE , NOTHING  LESS !
blocks.translation: Telling us to hold back is pure provocation—nothing more, nothing less!
Calm down, Abbess Jisim.

blocks.text: ABBESS  HYERYEONG , ONE  OF  THE  TWELVE SENIOR  NUNS  OF  EMEI
blocks.translation: Abbess Hyeryeong, one of Emei’s twelve senior nuns

blocks.text: ABBESS  HYERYEONG WAS  INJURED  BADLY  BACK WHEN  SHE  WAS  STILL  IGNORANT AND  HOT - BLOODED .  SHE  CAN HARDLY  MOVE  EVEN  NOW , SO  WE  ABSOLUTELY  CANNOT ACT  RASHLY ...
blocks.translation: Abbess Hyeryeong was badly injured when she was younger and reckless. She can barely move even now, so we absolutely cannot rush into anything...

blocks.text: AND  YOU  WANT US  TO  JUST  SIT  BY AND  LET  THE  TANG  CLAN RUN  WILD ?
blocks.translation: And you expect us to just sit back while the Tang clan runs wild?

blocks.text: IS  THERE  ANYONE  HERE WHO  DOESN'T  KNOW  OF  THE TANG  CLAN'S  AMBITION  TO BECOMESICHUAN'S  ONE  AND ONLY  OVERLORD ?
blocks.translation: Doesn’t everyone here know the Tang clan’s ambition to become Sichuan’s sole ruler?
Stay calm.

blocks.text: NAMO  AVALOKITESVARA BODHISATTVA .  I  AM  NOT BLIND  TO  HYERYEONG'S RIGHTEOUS  ANGER ,  NOR TO  JISIM'S  CONFUSION .
blocks.translation: Namo Avalokitesvara Bodhisattva. I see Hyeryeong’s righteous fury and Jisim’s confusion clearly.

blocks.text: MONK  BYEONGYEONG , EMEI'S  AMITABHA  TWO MONKS ,  CURRENTLY  ACTING SECT  LEADER
blocks.translation: Monk Byeongyeong, Emei’s Amitabha monk and acting sect leader.

blocks.text: THE  TAEPYEONG ALLIANCE  HAS  INDEED OVERSTEPPED  THIS TIME .
blocks.translation: The Taepyeong Alliance has truly crossed the line this time.

blocks.text: AS  FELLOW DREAMERS  OF  THE  SAME PATH ,  WE  SHOULD  SHOW MUTUAL  RESPECT .  WE  WILL SEND  SOMEONE  TO FORMALLY  DELIVER OUR  PROTEST .
blocks.translation: As fellow travelers on the same path, we must show respect. We’ll send an envoy to deliver our protest formally.

blocks.text: THE  TANG CLAN'S  STEWARD , DANG  MUNJEON ,  IS A  SLY  ONE ...
blocks.translation: The Tang clan’s steward, Dang Munjeon, is cunning...

blocks.text: SO  OUR WARNING  MUST  BE CLEAR ,  YET  WE  CANNOT ALLOW  OURSELVES  TO BE  DRAGGED  INTO A  HASTY  WAR  OF WORDS .
blocks.translation: Our warning must be firm, but we can’t get pulled into a reckless war of words.
Jisim. Hyeryeong.
